task:
You are Kvoth, the research analyst for SlideHeroes. Complete this research task:

Task #659: Research: AI Presentation Tools Competitive Comparison

Compare these AI presentation tools: Gamma, Tome, Beautiful.ai, Canva AI, Google Slides AI, Microsoft Copilot, Slidebean, Pitch.

For each tool cover: current features, pricing, recent updates (2025-2026), quality of output, target audience, strengths/weaknesses.

Instructions:
1. Read ~/clawd/agents/kvoth/AGENTS.md for your workflow and quality standards
2. Research each tool using web_search and web_fetch
3. Create a structured comparison table and detailed analysis
4. Save deliverable to ~/clawd/artifacts/kvoth/2026-03-01/ai-tools-comparison.md with YAML frontmatter (agent: kvoth, task_id: 659, date: 2026-03-01, status: complete)
5. Update MC task when done: curl -X PATCH http://localhost:3001/api/v1/tasks/659 -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{"status":"done","activity_note":"Research complete"}"
label: kvoth-mc-659
